channel.title: The Predator Principle — The Cancer of Evolution · Nirodha Collective
channel.description: Provocative, claim-linked dispatches challenging destructive extraction.

item.title: Predators act even when they do not kill
item.description: The ecology of fear begins before the attack. Status E. A single empirical result in songbirds; not a universal effect size for all species.

item.title: Five signs that a system is becoming predatory
item.description: The teeth are not decisive. The structure is. Status I. This four-of-five threshold is a systems hypothesis that requires validation.

item.title: A predator is not a model for the future
item.description: An ancient survival strategy was elevated into a worldview. Status I. Interpretation: ecological predation and the defined system pattern are not identical.
